sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἰεχονίας

- Transliteration: Iechonias

- Phonetic: ee-ekh-on-ee'-as

- Definition: Jeconiah or Jehoiachin = "whom Jehovah establishes"

1. was the son of Jehoiakim, and for three months and ten days king of Judah until Nebuchadnezzar carried him into captivity (597 BC)

- Origin: of hebrew origin H3204

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H3204]; Jechonias (. e. Jekonjah) an Israelite: - Jechonias.
